entries.reason: 日英copy、VitePress route/SEO設定、generated CLI reference、build/deploy guard、契約テストは同じ公開distribution contractの入力と検証であり、分割すると一時的に誤った文書または検証されない配布面を作る。review ownerはpublic manual distribution contract reviewer一名で一貫して判断できる。
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.

entries.reason: This canonical decision replaces decision-1784117028797-06f048b0: pre-deploy guards prove clean tree and immutable provenance, the existing EN/JA Cloudflare runbooks define rollback, and live authority and deployment ID remain a post-merge operational observation.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.

entries.reason: 変更対象は公開文書、静的build/deploy guard、CLI help表示、契約テストのみで、schema、migration、query、cache、idempotency、replay semanticsを変更しない。data_state軸の活性化はrelease metadata中のstate語由来の偽陽性。
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.

entries.reason: CHANGELOG records the release; docs/reference/cloudflare-pages.md and its Japanese counterpart define npm run docs:deploy, EN/JA/discovery/source-commit live checks, dashboard rollback, and the deploy script now fails closed unless HEAD equals freshly fetched origin/main before and after build.
